# WebTools - Complete Tool Directory
# URL: https://free-toolbase.com/
# Updated: 2026-07-14
# Total Tools: 1500+
# Language: English + Chinese (bilingual)
#
# This file provides a comprehensive directory of all tools available on WebTools.
# Each tool is a standalone web page that works entirely in the browser.
# No server uploads, no registration required, 100% free.
#
## Category Hub Pages
#
# Browse tools by category:
- [JSON Tools (39+ tools)](https://free-toolbase.com/en/json/)

## Key Features

- **Pure Frontend**: All tools run entirely in the browser using JavaScript
- **Privacy First**: No data ever leaves your device
- **No Registration**: Use any tool instantly without signup
- **Bilingual**: Full English and Chinese support
- **Free Forever**: All tools are completely free
- **Open Source**: Source code available on GitHub

## Popular Tools

- [json-formatter](https://free-toolbase.com/en/json-formatter/)
- [password-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/password-generator/)
- [qr-code-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/qr-code-generator/)
- [base64-encode-decode](https://free-toolbase.com/en/base64-encode-decode/)
- [md5-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/md5-generator/)
- [sha256-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sha256-generator/)
- [url-encoder-decoder](https://free-toolbase.com/en/url-encoder-decoder/)
- [color-converter](https://free-toolbase.com/en/color-converter/)
- [image-resizer](https://free-toolbase.com/en/image-resizer/)
- [pdf-merge](https://free-toolbase.com/en/pdf-merge/)
- [sql-query-builder](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-query-builder/) - Visually build SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE SQL statements with JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY
- [sql-to-prisma](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-prisma/) - Convert SQL schema to Prisma schema
- [openapi-to-typescript](https://free-toolbase.com/en/openapi-to-typescript/) - Convert OpenAPI/Swagger specs to TypeScript types
- [tailwind-shadow-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/tailwind-shadow-generator/) - Generate Tailwind CSS box-shadow utilities
- [redirect-tracer](https://free-toolbase.com/en/redirect-tracer/) - Trace URL redirect chains, detect 301/302/307/308 status codes, batch check supported
- [http-status-code-reference](https://free-toolbase.com/en/http-status-code-reference/) - Complete HTTP status code reference (1xx-5xx), search, filter by category, detailed explanations

## Chrome Extensions

- Hash Generator (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-512)
- JSON Formatter & Validator
- Password Generator
- QR Code Generator

## Contact

- Website: https://free-toolbase.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/webtools-cn/tools-site (source code)
- Feedback: dexshuang@google.com

### [HTTP Status Lookup](https://free-toolbase.com/http-status-lookup/)
- CN: https://free-toolbase.com/http-status-lookup/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Look up HTTP status codes and their meanings instantly. Supports all standard HTTP status codes (1xx-5xx) with detailed descriptions and usage guidance.

### [SQL to TypeScript Interface](https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-typescript-interface/)
- CN: https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-typescript-interface/
- EN: https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-typescript-interface/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Convert SQL CREATE TABLE statements to TypeScript interfaces. Supports various SQL data types and generates clean, type-safe TypeScript definitions.
